title: pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. leiosperma
intro: Pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. leiosperma, also known as a type of fumitory, is a perennial plant species within the Papaveraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pseudo-fumaria alba subsp. leiosperma include potential treatments for digestive issues, such as bloating and diarrhea, as well as its possible application in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in small doses under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
